sentences.target: On se voit vendredi pour le déjeuner.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ sə vwa vɑ̃.dʁə.di puʁ lə de.ʒœ.ne/

translations.fr: On se voit vendredi pour le déjeuner.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ sə vwa vɑ̃.dʁə.di puʁ lə de.ʒœ.ne/
translations.en: We’re seeing each other Friday for lunch.
translations.es: Nos vemos el viernes para almorzar.
translations.de: Wir sehen uns am Freitag zum Mittagessen.
translations.yue: 我哋星期五見面食午飯。
translations.pt: Nos vemos na sexta-feira para almoçar.
translations.vi: Chúng ta gặp nhau vào thứ Sáu để ăn trưa.
translations.nl: We zien elkaar vrijdag voor de lunch.
translations.hi: हम शुक्रवार को दोपहर के खाने के लिए मिलेंगे.
translations.pl: Widzimy się w piątek na lunch.
translations.el: Θα βρεθούμε την Παρασκευή για μεσημεριανό.
translations.nb: Vi sees på fredag til lunsj.
translations.id: Kita bertemu hari Jumat untuk makan siang.
translations.sv: Vi ses på fredag till lunch.
translations.cs: V pátek se uvidíme na oběd.
translations.da: Vi ses på fredag til frokost.
translations.ja: 金曜日にランチで会います。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun (indefinite, often used as 'we'); syntactic subject of the verb 'voit'.
Reflexive/reciprocal clitic pronoun forming the pronominal verb 'se voir'; clitic object marker before the verb.
Main lexical verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; agrees with 'On'.
Day-name noun used bare as an adverbial temporal complement (time of the event).
Preposition introducing the prepositional phrase 'pour le déjeuner' (purpose/occasion).
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'déjeuner'.
Common noun; head of the noun phrase governed by 'pour'.

sentences.target: Je travaille vendredi, mais pas ce week-end.
sentences.reading: /ʒə tʁa.vaj vɑ̃.dʁə.di mɛ pa sə wi.kɛnd/

translations.fr: Je travaille vendredi, mais pas ce week-end.
translations.ipa: /ʒə tʁa.vaj vɑ̃.dʁə.di mɛ pa sə wi.kɛnd/
translations.en: I’m working on Friday, but not this weekend.
translations.es: Trabajo el viernes, pero no este fin de semana.
translations.de: Ich arbeite am Freitag, aber nicht dieses Wochenende.
translations.it: Lavoro venerdì, ma non questo fine settimana.
translations.ko: 금요일에는 일하지만 이번 주말에는 일하지 않아요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我周五上班，但这个周末不上班。
translations.yue: 我星期五返工，但呢個週末唔返工。
translations.ru: Я работаю в пятницу, но не в эти выходные.
translations.pt: Trabalho na sexta-feira, mas não neste fim de semana.
translations.he: אני עובד ביום שישי, אבל לא בסוף השבוע הזה.
translations.tr: Cuma günü çalışıyorum ama bu hafta sonu çalışmıyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi làm việc vào thứ Sáu nhưng không làm cuối tuần này.
translations.ar: أنا أعمل يوم الجمعة، لكن ليس في عطلة نهاية هذا الأسبوع.
translations.nl: Ik werk vrijdag, maar niet dit weekend.
translations.uk: Я працюю в п’ятницю, але не цих вихідних.
translations.hu: Pénteken dolgozom, de ezen a hétvégén nem.
translations.hi: मैं शुक्रवार को काम करता हूँ, लेकिन इस सप्ताहांत नहीं.
translations.pl: Pracuję w piątek, ale nie w ten weekend.
translations.el: Δουλεύω την Παρασκευή, αλλά όχι αυτό το Σαββατοκύριακο.
translations.nb: Jeg jobber på fredag, men ikke denne helgen.
translations.id: Saya bekerja pada hari Jumat, tapi tidak akhir pekan ini.
translations.sv: Jag jobbar på fredag men inte i helgen.
translations.ro: Lucrez vineri, dar nu în acest weekend.
translations.cs: V pátek pracuji, ale ne o tomto víkendu.
translations.da: Jeg arbejder fredag, men ikke denne weekend.
translations.fi: Teen töitä perjantaina, mutta en tänä viikonloppuna.
translations.ja: 金曜日は働きますが、今週末は働きません。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 1st person singular; subject of 'travaille'.
Main verb, present indicative 1st person singular.
Day-name noun used adverbially as a temporal complement.
Coordinating conjunction introducing a contrastive second coordinate.
Negation particle (used without 'ne' here), negating the elliptical second coordinate.
Demonstrative determiner modifying 'week-end'.
Compound noun; head of the temporal NP in the negated fragment 'pas ce week-end'.

sentences.target: Vendredi, nous partons tôt pour la montagne.
sentences.reading: /vɑ̃.dʁə.di nu paʁ.tɔ̃ to puʁ la mɔ̃.taɲ/

translations.fr: Vendredi, nous partons tôt pour la montagne.
translations.ipa: /vɑ̃.dʁə.di nu paʁ.tɔ̃ to puʁ la mɔ̃.taɲ/
translations.en: Friday, we leave early for the mountains.
translations.es: El viernes salimos temprano a la montaña.
translations.de: Am Freitag fahren wir früh in die Berge.
translations.it: Venerdì partiamo presto per la montagna.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们周五一早出发去山里。
translations.yue: 我哋星期五一早出發上山。
translations.ru: В пятницу мы рано уезжаем в горы.
translations.pt: Na sexta-feira saímos cedo para as montanhas.
translations.he: ביום שישי אנחנו יוצאים מוקדם להרים.
translations.tr: Cuma günü dağlara erken yola çıkıyoruz.
translations.vi: Thứ Sáu chúng tôi đi sớm lên núi.
translations.ar: يوم الجمعة نغادر مبكرًا إلى الجبال.
translations.nl: Vrijdag vertrekken we vroeg naar de bergen.
translations.uk: У п’ятницю ми рано вирушаємо в гори.
translations.hi: शुक्रवार को हम पहाड़ों के लिए जल्दी निकलते हैं.
translations.pl: W piątek wyjeżdżamy wcześnie w góry.
translations.el: Την Παρασκευή φεύγουμε νωρίς για τα βουνά.
translations.nb: På fredag drar vi tidlig til fjellet.
translations.id: Hari Jumat kami berangkat pagi-pagi ke pegunungan.
translations.sv: På fredag åker vi tidigt till fjällen.
translations.cs: V pátek vyrážíme brzy do hor.
translations.da: Fredag tager vi tidligt af sted til bjergene.
translations.ja: 金曜日は早く山へ出発します。

tokens.explanation: Day-name noun placed sentence-initially; topicalized temporal complement.
Subject pronoun, 1st person plural; subject of 'partons'.
Main verb, present indicative 1st person plural.
Adverb modifying the verb ('partons') to indicate time manner (earliness).
Preposition introducing the PP 'pour la montagne' (destination/goal).
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'montagne'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'pour'.

sentences.target: Vous venez vendredi soir à la maison.
sentences.reading: /vu və.ne vɑ̃.dʁə.di swaʁ a la mɛ.zɔ̃/

translations.fr: Vous venez vendredi soir à la maison.
translations.ipa: /vu və.ne vɑ̃.dʁə.di swaʁ a la mɛ.zɔ̃/
translations.es: Vienen el viernes por la noche a casa.
translations.de: Ihr kommt am Freitagabend zu uns.
translations.yue: 你哋星期五晚上嚟我屋企。
translations.ru: В пятницу вечером вы придёте ко мне домой.
translations.pt: Vocês vêm na sexta-feira à noite aqui em casa.
translations.he: אתם באים ביום שישי בערב אליי הביתה.
translations.vi: Tối thứ Sáu bạn đến nhà tôi.
translations.ar: أنتم قادمون مساء الجمعة إلى منزلي.
translations.nl: Jullie komen vrijdagavond bij mij thuis.
translations.uk: У п’ятницю ввечері ви приходите до мене додому.
translations.hi: आप शुक्रवार शाम मेरे घर आ रहे हैं.
translations.pl: Przychodzicie w piątek wieczorem do mnie.
translations.el: Την Παρασκευή το βράδυ έρχεστε σπίτι μου.
translations.nb: Dere kommer hjem til meg fredag kveld.
translations.id: Kalian datang ke rumah saya pada Jumat malam.
translations.sv: Ni kommer hem till mig på fredag kväll.
translations.ro: Veniți vineri seara la mine acasă.
translations.cs: V pátek večer přijdete ke mně domů.
translations.da: I kommer hjem til mig fredag aften.
translations.ja: 金曜日の夜にうちに来ます。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 2nd person plural (or formal singular); subject of 'venez'.
Main verb, present indicative 2nd person plural.
Day-name noun modifying 'soir' within the temporal NP 'vendredi soir'.
Noun denoting time of day; head of the NP 'vendredi soir' serving as temporal complement.
Preposition introducing the locative PP 'à la maison'.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'maison'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'à' forming a locative complement.
